Notes.Text:
This update for hauler fixes the following issues:

Changes in hauler:

- update x/net to v0.55.0 (bsc#1266602, CVE-2026-39821)
Notes.Title: Details

Notes.Title: Terms of Use

Vulnerabilities.Description: The ToASCII and ToUnicode functions incorrectly accept Punycode-encoded labels that decode to an ASCII-only label. For example, ToUnicode("xn--example-.com") incorrectly returns the name "example.com" rather than an error. This behavior can lead to privilege escalation in programs using the idna package. For example, a program which performs privilege checks on the ASCII hostname may reject "example.com" but permit "xn--example-.com". If that program subsequently converts the ASCII hostname to Unicode, it will inadvertently permits access to the Unicode name "example.com".
